name: jump_cut
description: Split a clip into sub-clips by removing time ranges. Metadata-only operation on tracks[0] — no video encoding. Render engine materializes at render time.

params.name: clip-id
params.description: ID of the clip on tracks[0] to jump-cut

params.name: cuts
params.description: JSON array of [start, end] ranges to REMOVE in clip-local time (0 = clip start). Mutually exclusive with keeps.

params.name: keeps
params.description: JSON array of [start, end] ranges to KEEP in clip-local time. Mutually exclusive with cuts.
